title: Transactional Outbox Pattern
description: Master the Transactional Outbox Pattern to guarantee atomic consistency between database updates and message emissions. Ensure the avoidance of "Ghost Messages" or "Lost Events" in event-driven architectures.
objectives: Master the Transactional Outbox Pattern to guarantee atomic consistency between database updates and message emissions.
Ensure the avoidance of "Ghost Messages" or "Lost Events" in event-driven architectures.
